description: An analysis runs against globally installed packages, so a CRAN update silently changes results between runs.
body: Failure mode: code depends on whatever package versions are installed globally rather than a pinned project library, so a CRAN update changes a default or algorithm and results differ between runs or machines. Detection signals: a result that changes after a package upgrade; a collaborator getting different output; no renv.lock in the project. Do not ship an analysis without pinned dependencies. Safer fallback: initialize renv, snapshot to renv.lock, and restore from the lockfile elsewhere.
